statement.headerDoc:
STEP 998 — LDP-v2.1.1 Lifecycle Disjunction Projection Lean 4 Scaffolding
  =========================================================================

  Type-level verification of T-LIFECYCLE-DISJUNCTION-PROJECTION v2.1.1
  (Rei-AIOS retreat-refined response to chat Claude critique 2026-04-25).

  Claim under test:
    "Gödel's 1951 disjunction admits an operational scaffold via axisT_partial,
    where stage : UndecidedStatement → Time → KnowledgeState ⇀ AxisT_partial
    is σ-local monotonic on TRUE, allows FLOWING ↔ BOTH bidirectional, and
    where P_axisT projection is idempotent (P² = P)
